      type: "string",

    publishedAt: {
      type: "date",

    updatedAt: {

    author: {
      type: "string",

    },
    tags: {
      type: "list",
      of: { type: "string" },
    },
  },
  computedFields: {
    url: {
      type: "string",
      resolve: (doc) => \`/blogs/\${doc._raw.flattenedPath}\`,
    },
  },
}));

export default makeSource({

  contentDirPath: "content",

import { sortBlogs } from "@/src/utils";
import Image from "next/image";
import React from "react";
const HomeCoverSection = ({ blogs }) => {
  const sortedBlogs = sortBlogs(blogs);
  const blog = sortedBlogs[0];
  return (
    <div className="w-full inline-block">
      <article className="flex flex-col justify-end mx-10 relative h-[85vh]">
        <Image
          src={blog.image.filePath.replace("../public", "")}
          placeholder="blur"
          blurDataURL={blog.image.blurhashDataUrl}
          alt={blog.title}
          fill
          className="w-full h-full object-center object-cover rounded-3xl"
        />
      </article>
    </div>
  );
};

export default HomeCoverSection;`),document.getElementById("copy7").textContent="\u2714\uFE0F copied",setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById("copy7").textContent=""},2e3)},children:(0,e.jsxDEV)(n.p,{children:"\u{1F4C4} Code Copy"},void 0,!1,{fileName:"/Users/baekki/Desktop/Portfolio/next-blog/content/_mdx_bundler_entry_point-70f52bca-e926-4098-bb27-f6a9e59e4a4c.mdx",lineNumber:444,columnNumber:3},this)},void 0,!1,{fileName:"/Users/baekki/Desktop/Portfolio/next-blog/content/_mdx_bundler_entry_point-70f52bca-e926-4098-bb27-f6a9e59e4a4c.mdx",lineNumber:412,columnNumber:1},this),`

import { sortBlogs } from "@/src/utils";
import Image from "next/image";
import React from "react";
const HomeCoverSection = ({ blogs }) => {
  const sortedBlogs = sortBlogs(blogs);
  const blog = sortedBlogs[0];
  return (
    <div className="w-full inline-block">
      <article className="flex flex-col justify-end mx-10 relative h-[85vh]">
        <div className=" absolute top-0 left-0 bottom-0 right-0 h-full bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent from-0% to-dark/90 rounded-3xl" />

          placeholder="blur"
          blurDataURL={blog.image.blurhashDataUrl}
          alt={blog.title}
          fill
          className="w-full h-full object-center object-cover rounded-3xl -z-10"
        />
      </article>
    </div>
  );
};

import { sortBlogs } from "@/src/utils";
import Image from "next/image";
import Link from "next/link";
import React from "react";
const HomeCoverSection = ({ blogs }) => {
  const sortedBlogs = sortBlogs(blogs);
  const blog = sortedBlogs[0];
  return (
    <div className="w-full inline-block">
      <article className="flex flex-col justify-end mx-10 relative h-[85vh]">
        <div className=" absolute top-0 left-0 bottom-0 right-0 h-full bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent from-0% to-dark/90 rounded-3xl z-0" />
        <Image
          src={blog.image.filePath.replace("../public", "")}
          placeholder="blur"
          blurDataURL={blog.image.blurhashDataUrl}
          alt={blog.title}
          fill
          className="w-full h-full object-center object-cover rounded-3xl -z-10"
        />
        <div className="w-3/4 p-16 flex flex-col justify-center text-light z-10">
          <Link href={\`/categories/\${blog.tags[0]}\`}>{blog.tags[0]}</Link>
          <h1>{blog.title}</h1>
          <p>{blog.description}</p>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  );

import { sortBlogs } from "@/src/utils";
import Image from "next/image";
import Link from "next/link";
import React from "react";
import Tag from "../Elements/Tag";
const HomeCoverSection = ({ blogs }) => {
  const sortedBlogs = sortBlogs(blogs);
  const blog = sortedBlogs[0];
  return (
    <div className="w-full inline-block">
      <article className="flex flex-col justify-end mx-10 relative h-[85vh]">
        <div className=" absolute top-0 left-0 bottom-0 right-0 h-full bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent from-0% to-dark/90 rounded-3xl z-0" />
        <Image
          src={blog.image.filePath.replace("../public", "")}
          placeholder="blur"
          blurDataURL={blog.image.blurhashDataUrl}
          alt={blog.title}
          fill
          className="w-full h-full object-center object-cover rounded-3xl -z-10"
        />
        <div className="w-3/4 p-16 flex flex-col justify-center text-light z-10">
          <Tag link={\`/categories/\${blog.tags[0]}\`} name={blog.tags[0]} />
          <h1>{blog.title}</h1>
          <p>{blog.description}</p>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  );
};

`,(0,e.jsxDEV)("button",{onClick:()=>{navigator.clipboard.writeText(`
import { sortBlogs } from "@/src/utils";
import Image from "next/image";
import Link from "next/link";
import React from "react";
import Tag from "../Elements/Tag";
const HomeCoverSection = ({ blogs }) => {
  const sortedBlogs = sortBlogs(blogs);
  const blog = sortedBlogs[0];
  return (
    <div className="w-full inline-block">
      <article className="flex flex-col justify-end mx-10 relative h-[85vh]">
        <div className=" absolute top-0 left-0 bottom-0 right-0 h-full bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent from-0% to-dark/90 rounded-3xl z-0" />
        <Image
          src={blog.image.filePath.replace("../public", "")}
          placeholder="blur"
          blurDataURL={blog.image.blurhashDataUrl}
          alt={blog.title}
          fill
          className="w-full h-full object-center object-cover rounded-3xl -z-10"
        />
        <div className="w-3/4 p-16 flex flex-col justify-center text-light z-10">
          <Tag link={\`/categories/\${blog.tags[0]}\`} name={blog.tags[0]} />
          <Link href={blog.url} className="mt-6">
            <h1 className="font-bold capitalize text-4xl">
              <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-accent to-accent bg-[length:0px_6px] hover:bg-[length:100%_6px] bg-left-bottom bg-no-repeat transition-[background-size] duration-500">
                {blog.title}
              </span>
            </h1>
          </Link>
          <p className="inline-block mt-4 text-xl font-in">
            {blog.description}
          </p>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  );
};

export default HomeCoverSection;`),document.getElementById("copy12").textContent="\u2714\uFE0F copied",setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById("copy12").textContent=""},2e3)},children:(0,e.jsxDEV)(n.p,{children:"\u{1F4C4} Code Copy"},void 0,!1,{fileName:"/Users/baekki/Desktop/Portfolio/next-blog/content/_mdx_bundler_entry_point-70f52bca-e926-4098-bb27-f6a9e59e4a4c.mdx",lineNumber:875,columnNumber:3},this)},void 0,!1,{fileName:"/Users/baekki/Desktop/Portfolio/next-blog/content/_mdx_bundler_entry_point-70f52bca-e926-4098-bb27-f6a9e59e4a4c.mdx",lineNumber:827,columnNumber:1},this),`
